prompt: Foundation helps humans and agents accomplish goals by turning intent, knowledge, evidence, and current reality into a durable operating system.
reason: The phrase names the whole system purpose, boundaries, and operating model.

prompt: Make outstanding work repeatable across human and agent runs.
reason: It names a broad durable outcome family with multiple child outcomes.

prompt: Agent-safe workflow loops are available with bounded context and revision gates.
reason: It names a narrower standing ability under repeatable work.

prompt: Create an agent-safe workflow loop for spec authoring.
reason: It is triggered work an actor performs to make the ability available.

prompt: A complete source-backed repo file inventory is available.
reason: It names a durable evidence condition, not the work of recording rows.

prompt: Record every repo-owned file into the inventory.
reason: It is triggered inventory work with inputs, process, output, and exit criteria.
A file or route can expose behavior but is not itself a reliable outcome.
It names a durable user-facing ability; parent or child depends on surrounding map.
Implementation behavior and storage contract matter for an existing user-facing ability.

prompt: Pay employees accurately and on time.
reason: It names a durable business ability.

prompt: Run payroll for this pay period.
reason: It has a trigger, actor, process, output, and completion condition.

prompt: Judge ten candidate requests and verify the selected spec type.
reason: It defines evidence and acceptance judgment for routing quality.

prompt: Source evidence is distinguishable from assumptions.
reason: It names a standing knowledge-quality condition.

prompt: Label each row as fact, inference, assumption, or gap.

reason: It is technical when scoped to one implementation; it is a child capability only if it names a reusable operating ability.
